category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Brunei.

title.en: China-to-Brunei EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入文莱：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入汶萊：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Brunei DES (Department of Electrical Services) requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, NSC (Department of Standards Brunei) conformity assessment context, OCPP interoperability, ASEAN AEMTS framework, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与文莱DES（电气服务部）要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、NSC（文莱标准局）合格评定背景、OCPP互操作、东盟AEMTS框架，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與汶萊DES（電氣服務部）要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、NSC（汶萊標準局）合格評定背景、OCPP互操作、東盟AEMTS框架，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Brunei, the confirmed practical gaps are connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC), since Brunei follows the IEC 62196 ecosystem and GB/T connectors are physically incompatible; IEC 61851-based safety evidence accepted by DES (Department of Electrical Services, Ministry of Development), as no specific published Brunei EV-charger code has been confirmed as of 2026-06; IP54 minimum enclosure protection for outdoor units in Brunei's tropical climate (27–32°C, high humidity year-round); OCPP back-office interoperability, as Brunei has no confirmed mandatory protocol but IEC / OCPP-aligned infrastructure is the expected path; and DES electrical installation coordination and approval for grid-connected units. Brunei operates on 230/400 V 50 Hz, close to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz, so voltage-range confirmation is straightforward but still required. No confirmed EV-charger-specific mandatory conformity marking scheme under NSC has been found as of 2026-06-14; exporters should coordinate directly with DES and the local importer before shipment. The ASEAN AEMTS (ASEAN EV MRA Technical Specifications) framework is under development and is not yet binding.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入文莱时，已确认的实务差距包括：接口须从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流），因文莱遵循IEC 62196体系，GB/T接口在物理上不兼容；须提供文莱电气服务部（DES，隶属发展部）认可的IEC 61851安全证据，截至2026年6月，未发现文莱已发布针对电动汽车充电桩的具体法规；文莱热带气候（全年27-32°C，高湿度）下室外设备须达到最低IP54防护等级；OCPP后台互操作——文莱无已确认的强制协议，但IEC / OCPP体系基础设施是预期路径；以及并网设备的DES电气安装协调与审批。文莱电网为230/400 V 50 Hz，与中国220/380 V 50 Hz接近，电压范围确认相对简便，但仍为必要步骤。截至2026年6月14日，未发现NSC针对电动汽车充电桩设有专项强制合格评定标志方案，出口商应在发货前直接与DES及当地进口商协调。东盟AEMTS（东盟电动汽车互认协议技术规范）框架尚在制定中，目前不具约束力。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入汶萊時，已確認的實務差距包括：接口須從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流），因汶萊遵循IEC 62196體系，GB/T接口在物理上不兼容；須提供汶萊電氣服務部（DES，隸屬發展部）認可的IEC 61851安全證據，截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊已發布針對電動汽車充電樁的具體法規；汶萊熱帶氣候（全年27-32°C，高濕度）下室外設備須達到最低IP54防護等級；OCPP後台互操作——汶萊無已確認的強制協議，但IEC / OCPP體系基礎設施是預期路徑；以及併網設備的DES電氣安裝協調與審批。汶萊電網為230/400 V 50 Hz，與中國220/380 V 50 Hz接近，電壓範圍確認相對簡便，但仍為必要步驟。截至2026年6月14日，未發現NSC針對電動汽車充電樁設有專項強制合格評定標誌方案，出口商應在發貨前直接與DES及當地進口商協調。東盟AEMTS（東盟電動汽車互認協議技術規範）框架尚在制定中，目前不具約束力。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DES scope determination, NSC conformity assessment approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Brunei DES electrical installation requirements, NSC conformity assessment rules, IEC standard editions, ASEAN AEMTS status, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DES适用范围裁定、NSC合格评定批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行文莱DES电气安装要求、NSC合格评定规则、IEC标准版本、东盟AEMTS状态及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DES適用範圍裁定、NSC合格評定批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行汶萊DES電氣安裝要求、NSC合格評定規則、IEC標準版本、東盟AEMTS狀態及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
